description: Inside the Hydra facility, Ruby’s powers are dangerously unstable. With Hale and Daisy both trying to talk her down, emotions run high. Yo-Yo, May, Fitz, and Simmons attempt to regroup and escape, but Yo-Yo realizes Ruby is the inevitable Destroyer of Worlds she foresaw and chooses to intervene. Despite Daisy’s protests, Yo-Yo ends the threat with lethal force, killing Ruby and traumatizing Hale.
location: Hydra facility (abandoned English nuclear silo / Particle Infusion Chamber site)

transcript.line: You know, for a long time, you were everything that I wanted. You were my hero. And now look at us.
Ruby, let her go.
I am more than you will ever be.
Ruby, I am not here to fight you. You need help.
I don't want your help! I want to crush you.
Ruby, that's enough! That's enough! You listen to her. She is on your side.
Then why aren't you?! Mum, face it, I was never good enough for you.
No, all I ever wanted was for you to reach your true potential. I'm sorry. I pushed you too hard.
Mum, this was a mistake.
No. My daughter is not a mistake.
Yo-Yo, get out of here.
I promise you, we'll get through this. Okay, just breathe...
That's who took my arm.
No, Ruby.
It's her, isn't it? She's the Destroyer.
Yo-Yo, she's a kid. She is terrified.
No, you look at me, listen to me. Stay with me, and we'll get through this!
No, Mum, they're getting louder! ♪ Oh, I'm losing... Let us out. We want out. Let us out. I won't be able to resist.
Do it!
I can make this better, I promise! Ruby. What? Ruby? Ruby! No!
No. Yo-Yo, what did you do?!
No. No. No! No! Ruby. Ruby.
